MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court modifies the tentative ruling of hearing required as follows:

PLAINTIFF LARA MERTENS' Motion To Compel The Attendance At Deposition Of Defendants Zoe Kuhn And Rebecca Jacobik And Request For Monetary Sanctions.

The parties have now resolved all issues raised in the motion by way of a stipulation and no hearing or further order is required.

Order and stipulation to resolve motion to compel attendance at depositions is signed.(see scanned order for full details)
